title: Minimize Manhattan Distances
description: Remove exactly one point and minimize the maximum Manhattan distance among every remaining pair. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: points: list[list[int]]. 3 <= len(points) <=100000; coordinates may repeat and lie in [-1e8,1e8]; remove exactly one point.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
